response.justification: While Bogdan meets the educational requirement (BS + 13 years experience) and demonstrates genuine senior-level engineering maturity with systems thinking, he is fundamentally a software engineer with zero documented experience in hardware architecture, SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator optimization—all core to this Principal-level hardware role. His background is web, mobile, backend, and infrastructure software; this position requires specialized chip design and hardware-software co-design expertise he does not possess.
strengths: Senior/Staff level systems engineering experience with microservices, infrastructure, and full-stack ownership across multiple companies
Demonstrated performance optimization mindset through low-latency data processing at Dunnhumby and pricing algorithm work at Optilyz
Strong technical breadth across multiple languages and ability to learn—solid craftsman mentality evident from open-source contributions and workshop leadership
concerns: No hardware architecture, SoC modeling, or chip design experience—the core responsibility of the role
No GPU architecture, AI accelerator, or SIMD/MIMD optimization background despite being explicit preferred qualifications
Career trajectory is entirely software-focused with no evidence of hardware-software co-design or systems-on-chip work

key_factors.factor: No GPU or AI accelerator architecture background
